put.summary: Cancel a demo schedule with a reason
Update status of a contact message (e.g., READ or RESOLVED)

put.description: Edits the text content of a comment

get.description: View full blog details including author email/mobile — admin only

put.description: Admin can edit blog content before or after publishing

delete.description: Delete a blog by ID permanently.

post.summary: Submit demo schedule with OTP verification
Send OTP to user's email for demo scheduling
Submit a contact us message (No OTP required)

get.description: Fetch published blogs with optional search, year/month filter, and sorting

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: recent (default), popular, oldest, most_commented

post.description: Users or educators can submit a blog post. It goes to PENDING status awaiting admin approval.
Toggle LIKE or DISLIKE for a visitor

get.description: Get paginated visible comments for a blog

post.description: Post a new comment on a blog
Verifies the OTP and activates the subscription
Deactivates the subscription for the given email
Sends an OTP to the provided email address
Verifies the OTP sent to the author's email.
Sends an OTP to the author's email to verify ownership before submission.
Creates the blog post in PENDING status. Requires email to be verified first.

post.summary: Verify OTP — returns JWT token and user info
Start login — sends OTP to the given email
Request OTP for user password reset
Submit a new answer (requires authentication, starts as PENDING)

get.description: Admin dashboard list of all live testimonials

post.description: Since public submissions are closed, Admins manually submit sourced testimonials here
Marks this testimonial as the primary/featured one for its teacher. Only one primary per teacher — any existing primary is cleared.

post.summary: Create a new contact subject for the dropdown
Request OTP for Admin passwordless login
Request OTP for Admin passwordless login
Request password reset OTP via email
Request password reset OTP via email

post.description: Allows logged-in users to change their password
Approves a pending comment, making it visible to the public
Reject a PENDING blog. Reason is required. Sends rejection email to author.
Approve a PENDING blog. Sets status to PUBLISHED and sends notification email to author.

get.description: Returns testimonials marked as primary by admin — used for homepage showcase

get.summary: Get all questions with optional category filter
Get all active grades for dropdown
Get all active boards for dropdown
Get all active subjects for the contact dropdown

get.description: Returns a cryptographically signed ticket allowing the frontend to upload a massive video/image directly to Cloudinary without consuming server bandwidth. Requires a valid JWT User/Admin token.
Fetch full blog detail by its URL-friendly slug
Get current reaction state for a visitor
Returns year → month breakdown with blog counts for the sidebar archive index

get.summary: Get all approved answers for a specific question

get.description: Downloads a spreadsheet containing all testimonials. Notice how the CSV logic is entirely decoupled from the entity.

get.summary: Get list of demo schedules with optional filters
View paginated and filtered contact messages
List all answers with optional filtering by status/questionId

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile info
List all comments waiting for admin approval
List all comments regardless of status
List blogs filtered by status (PENDING, PUBLISHED, REJECTED, DRAFT). If no status is provided, returns all blogs.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: PENDING, PUBLISHED, REJECTED, DRAFT

delete.summary: Delete an old contact message permanently

CreateBlogRequest.description: Request body for creating a blog post

title.example: How to Prepare for IGCSE Physics

excerpt.example: A comprehensive guide to acing IGCSE Physics exams

contentJson.description: Blog content in JSON format (optional, for editors like TipTap)

tags.description: Tags for the blog

authorMobile.description: Mobile number of the blog author

BlogDetailResponse.description: Full detail view of a blog post

title.example: How to Prepare for IGCSE Physics

excerpt.example: A comprehensive guide to acing IGCSE Physics exams

tags.description: Tags

preferredDate.description: Preferred date for the demo in YYYY-MM-DD format

otp.description: OTP sent to the email address

email.description: Email address to send the OTP to

messageText.description: The message body from the user
messageText.example: I would like to know more about the IGCSE physics course.

ToggleReactionRequest.description: Request to toggle a LIKE or DISLIKE reaction on a blog

visitorKey.description: Unique anonymous identifier from frontend local storage

PostCommentRequest.description: Request to post a new comment on a blog

Verify.description: Request to verify OTP for blog subscription

Unsubscribe.description: Request to unsubscribe from blog updates

Start.description: Request to start blog subscription via OTP

AuthVerifyRequest.description: Request to verify OTP and receive a JWT token

AuthResponse.description: Response after successful OTP verification — contains the JWT and user info

AuthStartRequest.description: Request to start login by sending an OTP to the user's email

AdminVerifyOtpLoginRequest.description: Request to verify OTP for Admin login

AdminLoginOtpRequest.description: Request to send OTP for Admin login

RejectBlogRequest.description: Request body for rejecting a blog post

reason.description: Reason why the blog post was rejected
reason.example: The content does not meet our styling guidelines.

ApproveBlogRequest.description: Optional request body for approving a blog post

adminId.description: ID of the admin making the approval. Defaults to system admin if not provided.

BlogSummaryResponse.description: Summary view of a blog post (for listing pages)

title.example: How to Prepare for IGCSE Physics

excerpt.example: A comprehensive guide to acing IGCSE Physics exams

ArchiveResponse.description: Archive index — year/month breakdown with blog counts
